race.description: Become A Southside Racing Member Mdn Plate
race.comment: SCORCHING BEAUTY (12) has not raced since her debut on November 8 over 1000m at Listed level at Flemington when she finished fifth, beaten 6 lengths on tough ground, not all that far off Blue Diamond heroine Streisand. This suits nicely. CRIME OF PASSION (2) resumed from a spell last start when unplaced over 1005m at Sale on turf. Can improve off that and showed ability last time in. ALPHABET (1) made progress last time out, finishing 2.5 lengths from the winner in third at the end of 1200m at Ballarat Synthetic. Should be right there again with Mott booked. PRAISE HER (7) is a Toronado filly for the Begg yard who has jumped out very nicely, expecting a big run first time out.
